scripts.build: mkdir -p hostinger_dist && NEXT_DISABLE_INTERACTIVE_INSTALL=1 cd application && npm run build && cd ../packages/server && npm run build && cd ../.. && cp -r application/.next hostinger_dist/.next && cp -r application/public hostinger_dist/public && mkdir -p hostinger_dist/packages/server && cp -r packages/server/dist hostinger_dist/packages/server/dist && cp package.json server.js index.js .npmrc hostinger_dist/ && (cp -r node_modules hostinger_dist/node_modules || echo 'Node modules copy failed, skipping')
